Uses of Class
recoder.java.CompilationUnit

Packages that use CompilationUnit
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.removegenerics
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl
RIFL is short for "Requirements for Information Flow Language", a tool-indepentent specification language developed in the RS3 project.
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.
recoder.io
The io package provides classes to import and export source and class files.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
Contains transformations which attempt to make a java5 project compilable with -source 1.4 compiler switch and which can be used by a java 1.4 runtime environment.
recoder.parser
This package contains the JavaCC generated parser.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    Description

    UnitKit.appendImport(ChangeHistory ch, CompilationUnit cu, String typeName)
    Deprecated.
    should become a fully grown transformation.

    UnitKit.appendImport(ChangeHistory ch, CompilationUnit cu, ClassType ct)
    Deprecated.
    should become a fully grown transformation
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(CompilationUnit child)
    Registers a compilation unit.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(TypeDeclaration child, CompilationUnit parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Import child, CompilationUnit parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(PackageSpecification child, CompilationUnit parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(TypeDeclaration child, CompilationUnit parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Import child, CompilationUnit parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(PackageSpecification child, CompilationUnit parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static List<Import>
    UnitKit.getUnnecessaryImports(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, CompilationUnit cu)
    Query that finds all unnecessary import specifications in a compilation unit.

    UnitKit.normalizeImports(ChangeHistory ch, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, CompilationUnit cu, boolean removeMultiTypeImports, boolean removeSingleTypeImports, boolean addJavaLangImports, boolean addDefaultPackageImports)
    Deprecated.
    should become a fully grown transformation.
    static void
    MiscKit.prepend(ChangeHistory ch, CompilationUnit parent, Import child)
    Transformation that prepends the given Import to the list in the given Compilation Unit.
    static void
    UnitKit.removeUnusedImports(ChangeHistory ch, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, CompilationUnit cu)
    Deprecated.
    should become a first class transformation.

    UnitKit.sortImports(ChangeHistory ch, CompilationUnit cu)
    sort imports lexically and insert one blank line between different top level names !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! untested !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
